Passed enforced test review-ldiskfs-dne on RHEL 9.3/x86_64 uploaded by Onyx Autotest from onyx-76vm1: https://testing.whamcloud.com/test_sessions/aac6b72c-0e98-4eb9-9818-27e8e43ba5ee ran 5 tests.

Patch Set 1:

Looks like Gerrit Janitor didn't skip sanityn/116 like Maloo did,
maybe the serverbuildno doesn't work for janitor?

Also it failed to mount client2:
=== sanityn: start setup 20:59:21 (1716253161) ===
Starting client oleg108-client.virtnet:  -o user_xattr,flock oleg108-server@tcp:/lustre /mnt/lustre2
mount.lustre: mount oleg108-server@tcp:/lustre at /mnt/lustre2 failed: Input/output error
Is the MGS running?

== sanityn test 116: DNE: Set default LMV layout from a remote client ========================================================== 20:59:44 (1716253184)
llite.lustre-ffff88000002b000.intent_mkdir=1
MD layout /mnt/lustre/d116.sanityn:
lmv_stripe_count: 2 lmv_stripe_offset: 0 lmv_hash_type: crush
mdtidx		 FID[seq:oid:ver]
     0		 [0x200000400:0x2:0x0]		
     1		 [0x240000401:0x2:0x0]		
mkdir /mnt/lustre/d116.sanityn/tdir0
setdirstripe -D -i1 /mnt/lustre2/d116.sanityn/tdir0
lfs setdirstripe: cannot resolve path '/mnt/lustre2/d116.sanityn/tdir0': No such file or directory (2)
lfs setdirstripe: '/mnt/lustre2/d116.sanityn/tdir0' is not on a Lustre filesystem: No such file or directory (2)
lfs setdirstripe: cannot set default stripe on dir '/mnt/lustre2/d116.sanityn/tdir0': No such file or directory
 sanityn test_116: @@@@@@ FAIL: /home/green/git/lustre-release/lustre/utils/lfs setdirstripe /mnt/lustre2/d116.sanityn/tdir0 failed 
  Trace dump:
  = /home/green/git/lustre-release/lustre/tests/test-framework.sh:7030:error()
  = /home/green/git/lustre-release/lustre/tests/sanityn.sh:6731:test_116()
  = /home/green/git/lustre-release/lustre/tests/test-framework.sh:7375:run_one()
  = /home/green/git/lustre-release/lustre/tests/test-framework.sh:7435:run_one_logged()

Dumping lctl log to /tmp/testlogs//sanityn.test_116.*.1716253186.log
rsync: chown "/tmp/testlogs/.sanityn.test_116.debug_log.oleg108-server.1716253186.log.4uPSVQ" failed: Operation not permitted (1)
rsync: chown "/tmp/testlogs/.sanityn.test_116.dmesg.oleg108-server.1716253186.log.cvgZKs" failed: Operation not permitted (1)
rsync error: some files/attrs were not transferred (see previous errors) (code 23) at main.c(1651) [generator=3.1.2]
FAIL 116 (4s)

and the test case failed.

I think we need some help to make Janitor happy.

Patch Set 1:

Janitor will run any modified subtest 40x and does not care about Test-Parameters. If the tests being changed are not passing consistently, or are in ALWAYS_EXCEPT then this can be problematic. 

However, I don't really understand why this patch is needed, since we almost never test interop between development versions.

Patch Set 1:

> Patch Set 1:
> 
> Janitor will run any modified subtest 40x and does not care about Test-Parameters. If the tests being changed are not passing consistently, or are in ALWAYS_EXCEPT then this can be problematic. 
> 
> However, I don't really understand why this patch is needed, since we almost never test interop between development versions.

It's for
https://review.whamcloud.com/c/fs/lustre-release/+/54840
The Test-Parameters picked serverbuildno=4516 which is 2.15.61 but
668dfb53de LU-13577 wbc: reimplement mkdir() by using intent lock actually landed after 2.15.62.
Removed Code-Review-1 by Lustre Gerrit Janitor <lgerrit@linuxhacker.ru>

Patch Set 1:

This also showed signs of the initial client mount timing out, long before any of the changes in this patch could have affected the system behavior.  I believe this is an overload of the Janitor test system (or its network) caused by starting many test sessions all at the same time.  I'll open a separate ticket for that, so the client will retry mounting a few times.
Change has been successfully cherry-picked as 85716980de7c83a8d8eeb255bf24d9e0a972baf9 by Oleg Drokin

commit.subject: LU-13577 tests: fix interop checking for intent_mkdir tests
commit.message:
LU-13577 tests: fix interop checking for intent_mkdir tests

Use the correct interop version for replay-single/137a|b|c
sanity/852, sanityn/116

Change-Id: I0b7fc03c542574dfb468a17719a6be81d738c5b3
Fixes: 668dfb53de ("LU-13577 wbc: reimplement mkdir() by using intent lock")
Test-Parameters: trivial
Test-Parameters: serverjob=lustre-master serverbuildno=4524 testlist=replay-single env=ONLY="137a 137b 137c"
Test-Parameters: serverjob=lustre-master serverbuildno=4524 testlist=sanity env=ONLY=852
Test-Parameters: serverjob=lustre-master serverbuildno=4524 testlist=sanityn env=ONLY=116
Signed-off-by: Li Dongyang <dongyangli@ddn.com>
Reviewed-on: https://review.whamcloud.com/c/fs/lustre-release/+/55161
Tested-by: jenkins <devops@whamcloud.com>
Tested-by: Maloo <maloo@whamcloud.com>
Reviewed-by: Andreas Dilger <adilger@whamcloud.com>
Reviewed-by: Qian Yingjin <qian@ddn.com>
Reviewed-by: Oleg Drokin <green@whamcloud.com>
